payload:
GPU macro experiments on RunPod. SSH: 'ssh runpod'. 8-HOUR BUDGET.
Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active state.

CONTEXT: All-modules LoRA locked. Answer-conditioned PPL proven (r=0.811). Architecture is SOLE (Structurally Orthogonal Latent Experts). GPU latency validated (pre-merge +3.3%). See VISION.md, FINDINGS.md.

RULES:
- NEVER poll/sleep/wait. Start nohup background jobs, move on.
- Each task <2hrs active agent time.
- Check schedule: T+15min (health), then halve remaining time unti... [truncated, 1052 chars total]

GPU_BLOCKED: RunPod down (SSH connection reset from system OOM). exp_reasoning_expert_distillation prep complete — train/eval/composition scripts ready at micro/models/reasoning_expert_distillation/. Run: ssh runpod 'cd /workspace/llm && nohup bash micro/models/reasoning_expert_distillation/run_all.sh > reasoning_distill.log 2>&1 &'. exp_relora_composition_macro Phase 3 also blocked — adapters trained, metrics computation crashed. ETA: when RunPod pod is restarted.

GPU_BLOCKED: RunPod still down (connection reset, 2nd consecutive iteration). No CPU-side prep remaining. exp_reasoning_expert_distillation fully prepped (train/eval/composition scripts at micro/models/reasoning_expert_distillation/). exp_relora_composition_macro Phase 3 recovery documented. Run recovery steps in .ralph/current_direction.md when pod restarts.

Design review PROCEED for exp_reasoning_expert_distillation. No GPU results yet (RunPod blocked 3rd iteration). Scripts ready. Recovery steps in .ralph/current_direction.md. Reviewer recommendations: test both system prompts at eval, add binomial CIs, clarify MATH.md 2.2. Next: execute on GPU when pod returns, or pick next CPU-only hypothesis.

exp_structural_orthogonality_proof: SUPPORTED. Power law E[|cos|]=0.220*d^{-0.673}, d_crit~32r (~512 for r=16). K1 pass (17-69x below bound), K2 pass (clear power law decay), K3 killed (gradient cos higher than random but still tiny ~0.002-0.02). All real models d>=896 safely structural. Unblocks exp_grassmannian_expert_init. GPU still down for reasoning_expert_distillation.
exp_structural_orthogonality_proof PROVEN. Adversarial review PROCEED. 2 new hypotheses spawned (attention-layer ortho, converged adapter ortho). Unblocked exp_grassmannian_expert_init.

exp_grassmannian_expert_init PROVEN. AP-init gives 1.3-2.0x lower cosine than random at d=64,128,256. Drift 0.02% with frozen-A (permanent by construction). Skeleton is permanent infrastructure layer for SOLE. All 3 kill criteria PASS. Runtime 84s.

exp_grassmannian_expert_init needs 5 fixes: (1) Add Haar-random orthonormal control to isolate packing vs orthonormality benefit, (2) Add Wilcoxon signed-rank statistical test on paired cosines, (3) Reclassify K3 zero-drift as design property not empirical finding, (4) Reframe Finding 2 - geometry preserved not advantage carries through training, (5) Address d=256 tail anomaly where AP max cos exceeds random. See REVIEW-adversarial.md.

exp_grassmannian_expert_init REVISED->SUPPORTED: All 5 adversarial fixes applied. 3-condition experiment (AP vs random-orthonormal vs random-Gaussian). AP packing significant at d>=128 (p=0.009, p=0.012) but not d=64 (p=0.096). K3 reclassified as design property. Finding #2 reframed. d=256 tail anomaly discussed.

exp_grassmannian_expert_init PROVEN. AP packing genuine beyond orthonormality at d>=128 (p<0.012). 2 new hypotheses: minimax packing, TAAP convergence. Unblocks exp_scale_500_experts (still needs exp_distillation_pilot_50).

exp_frechet_merge_vs_arithmetic PROVEN. Chordal Frechet mean is strict upgrade over naive addition: +5% (N=2) to +34% (N=50) better subspace preservation. Grows monotonically with N. Geodesic mean killed (wrong objective). ~5 lines of code, zero serving latency cost (pre-merge). RunPod unreachable — GPU macro experiments blocked.

exp_frechet_merge_vs_arithmetic needs 6 fixes: (1) acknowledge subspace preservation metric is tautological for chordal mean, (2) report projection preservation for all N not just N=10, (3) downgrade PROVEN to SUPPORTED since K3 killed, (4) acknowledge K2 was vacuous, (5) add micro-scale downstream NTP loss test, (6) report AP-packed regime findings. See micro/models/frechet_merge/REVIEW-adversarial.md.

exp_frechet_merge_vs_arithmetic REVISED: all 6 adversarial fixes applied. Critical finding: downstream NTP test shows chordal Frechet merge WORSE than naive addition (-69% MSE penalty, 0% domain win rate). Geometric subspace advantage does not translate. Status downgraded to SUPPORTED with recommendation to KILL. PAPER.md fully rewritten with honest reporting.

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary
- Iterations: 12
- Duration: 4h 4m 19s
- Exit code: 2
